name: Summer Vegetable Spaghetti (Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Small yellow onions, cut into wedges
2 cups Chopped, peeled fresh ripe tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the first 10 ingredients and cook for 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the tomato paste and cover. Cook gently for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are tender.
3. Cook the spaghetti in unsalted water according to package directions.
4. Spoon the sauce over the drained hot spaghetti and sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
